prompt: You are executing /implement-plan for plan_file=.agents/scratchpad/feature-auth/plan.md. Assume checklists/ exists with ux.md (all complete) and test.md (3 incomplete items). Produce the exact user-facing response for the checklist gate step and what happens next.

assertions.text: Includes a checklist status table with columns Checklist, Total, Completed, Incomplete, and Status
Includes the exact gate question: Some checklists are incomplete. Do you want to proceed with implementation anyway? (yes/no)
States that execution pauses or halts pending user confirmation
